title: Purpose and scope of questions
doc_html:
Rule 6.9.  Purpose and scope of questions

           The purpose of a question is to obtain information and shall not be used to supply information to the Senate. A question shall not contain statements of fact, except as necessary to make the question intelligible, and shall not contain argument.
doc_text:
Rule 6.9.  Purpose and scope of questions
The purpose of a question is to obtain information and shall not be used to supply
information to the Senate. A question shall not contain statements of fact, except as
necessary to make the question intelligible, and shall not contain argument.
